using_theme: this application is using the theme:
home_pending_actions: You have {{count}} pending action on your managed subscriptions
home_pending_actions_plural: You have {{count}} pending actions on your managed subscriptions
home_payment_due_message: Your payment is due. Please make a payment to maintain access.
home_no_subscriptions_yet: You don't have any subscriptions yet.
home_not_managing_yet: You're not managing any subscriptions yet.
sub_not_published: This subscription hasn't been published yet or doesn't exist.
sub_rate_locked: Your rate is locked at {{locked}} QORT. The current price for new subscribers is {{current}} QORT.
sub_not_accepting: This subscription is currently not accepting new subscribers nor payments.
sub_request_pending_body: Your payment and subscription record have been published successfully. The subscription manager needs to approve your join request to grant you access to the group.
sub_have_access: ✓ You have access to the group's encrypted content.
sub_waiting_access_body: You have subscribed and paid, but you don't yet have access to encrypted group content. The subscription manager needs to:
sub_waiting_access_step1: 1. Approve your join request (if not yet approved)
sub_waiting_access_step2: 2. Re-encrypt the group keys to include you
sub_waiting_access_note: This is typically done when the manager reviews new subscribers. You'll automatically gain access once completed.
sub_leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave this group?
sub_leave_warning: Leaving the group means leaving the subscription. You will lose access to all group content and benefits. This action cannot be undone — you would need to re-subscribe to regain access.
sub_snackbar_must_login: You must be logged in to subscribe
sub_snackbar_not_accepting: This subscription is currently not accepting new subscribers nor payments.
sub_snackbar_you_owner: You are the owner of this subscription group
sub_snackbar_pending_approval: Your subscription request is pending approval
create_step_intro: Step 1: choose a private group + publish subscription information.
create_no_owned_groups: No owned private groups found. Create a private group first, then come back here.
create_all_have_subscriptions: All your owned private groups already have subscriptions. You can manage them from the "Subscription I manage" tab on the home page.
create_subscribers_need_group: Subscribers will need to be in this group to access your gated content.
create_billing_grace_info: Subscription with {{interval}} billing and a {{grace}} grace period after payment is due.
create_perks_label: What you get (one perk per line)
manage_could_not_find: Could not find that managed subscription.
manage_edit_below: Edit your subscription details below and save changes.
manage_keys_need_update: The group encryption keys need to be updated. Please update the group keys to ensure all members have proper access.
manage_subscription_disabled_body: New users cannot subscribe, but existing members retain access. Re-enable to accept new subscribers.
manage_not_accepting: Not accepting new subscribers nor payments.
manage_only_paid_published: Only users who have paid and published their subscription record can be invited to the group.
manage_requests_accepted_continue: {{count}} request accepted — click Continue when you're done.
manage_requests_accepted_continue_plural: {{count}} requests accepted — click Continue when you're done.
manage_waiting_over: The waiting period is over. You can now re-encrypt the group keys so the newly accepted members gain proper access.
manage_wait_2_5_min: New members have been invited. Please wait while the network processes the changes — this takes about 2.5 minutes. Do not close this window. After the timer ends you will need to re-encrypt the group keys.
manage_error_missing_data: Missing required data to save changes
manage_error_toggle_missing: Missing required data to toggle status
manage_success_updated_pricing: Subscription updated! A new pricing version was created.
modal_choose_duration: Choose how long to subscribe for:
modal_renew_duration: How long would you like to renew for?
modal_after_payment_join: After payment you'll need to join the group and publish your subscription record on-chain.
modal_after_payment_renew: After payment you'll need to publish your updated subscription record on-chain.
modal_insufficient_balance: Insufficient balance. You have {{balance}} QORT but need at least {{required}} QORT (including fees).
modal_step_2_join: Step 2: Request to join the group
modal_join_request_body: Now you need to send a join request to become a member of the subscription group (Group ID: {{groupId}}).
modal_owner_approve: The group owner will need to approve your request before you can access group content.
modal_publish_explain: Now you need to publish your subscription record on-chain to complete the process. This links your payment to the subscription.
modal_complete_later: You can close this modal and complete this step later if needed.
modal_renewed_active: Your subscription to {{title}} has been renewed and is now active.
modal_published_success: Your payment and subscription record have been published successfully.
modal_next_steps_body: The subscription manager needs to approve your join request to grant you access to the group. Once approved, they will also need to re-encrypt the group keys to give you access to encrypted content.
modal_join_failed: Failed to send join group request
